title_guess: Malvern evening / Little Gossingham: Kate & Ed's wedding weekend

pages.text:
__Packing for 7 for the w/end__. We seem to have needed 12 pints milk, 5 loaves 2 pkts coffee. 1½ iceberg lettuce.
~~Friday~~ Saturday we had cold chicken + cold stock, Sunday cheese + salad for lunch + apple pie lamb chops + sausage bbq in the evening. Monday cheese + eggs lunch, chicken evening. Needed 2 more puddings including Caramel flan.

~~Monday~~ __Tuesday 1st June__
We pack up + set off for the Alternative Technology Centre at __Machynlleth__? The veg, grown out of compost, are marvellous. It made us want to save water from the downpipes + get 3 compost bins for the garden. We had a delicious lunch (veg) in the cafeteria. We reached home before 6.

__Sunday June 27th__
Simon + Eve set off at 4.40. to pick up Helen + Margaret from Trimpley to go to Malvern. We are having supper in the

van at 6.30. before John's Vivaldi 'cello concerto at 7.30. Peter + Ben have been gliding. They will pick up Janet Ludford on the way for supper. Koroku + Charles might join us. Catherine + Colin + John will join us for a glass of wine after the concert.
In the end Hector Loring + René joined us too. We had a very good evening + we were extremely proud of John.

__Saturday July 3rd__
We left Peter, John, Koroku + Charles + Charles' friend, Charlie Mercer, at home (going go-karting) + Simon + Eve set off at 11.15 for Kate + Ed's wedding. At __Little Gossingham__.
It was a beautiful wedding in a church where the tower had fallen down in 1700s. Eve read St. Francis' prayer. Kate wore pale blue. There were no bridesmaids or pages. The reception was at Ed's parents' home. Very friendly. Beth Butler + Lygie Davies were there. Good hog roast.
